task_objective: Filter file browser dropdown to only allow directories and files with supported extensions.
design_decisions: Centralized supported extensions in src/wherewolf/constants.py for better maintainability and consistency between UI and engines.
Updated FileBrowser to filter items at the source (os.listdir) to improve user experience.
Updated existing error tests to reflect that invalid extensions are now filtered out rather than triggering a warning upon selection.
results: Successfully implemented filtering in the file browser. All tests pass, including new TDD tests and updated regression tests.
